title: Zoom callout (signature feature)
goal: Select a box → magnified callout with leader lines, fully live and restyleable.

tasks.title: ZoomCallout rasterizer: re-render source region at magnification, border+shadow+radius
tasks.notes: DocumentRenderer.ciImage now takes the composite-so-far as `backdrop`; .zoomCallout crops it to sourceRect (clamped to canvas, <1pt → skipped) and the existing scale-to-frame step provides magnification, so border/shadow/radius come free from LayerStyle. Callout sees only layers BELOW it. Liveness (5.5) falls out of this design — pixel-tested in ZoomCalloutRenderingTests.sourcePixelChangeReRendersInCallout. Gotcha: renderSprite() builds a single-layer doc, so a dragged callout sprite renders empty — 5.3 must handle drag preview differently (e.g. include backdrop layers or pre-render).

tasks.title: Source-region outline + leader lines drawn in matching style
tasks.notes: ZoomCalloutOverlayRasterizer (PhotonzRender) draws source outline + leader lines in canvas space (CG, top-left coords, returns image+origin); DocumentRenderer composites it beneath the callout box inside the layer loop. Outline: border color/width (1pt hairline floor when borderWidth=0), radius = style.cornerRadius/magnification so both boxes read as the same shape. Leaders: full outline width at 0.6 alpha (half-width was sub-pixel-invisible); endpoints from Geometry.leaderLines attach at frame corners, so caps peek over rounded corners — accepted, matches other tools.

tasks.title: Tool UX: drag box → callout appears animated into place; drag callout to reposition (leader lines follow)
tasks.notes: Tool.zoomCallout (Z key, replaces toolbar placeholder; sticky? no — returns to .select after one callout). ZoomCalloutBuilder (PhotonzCore, tested): drag box → pixel-aligned clamped source, frame via zoomCalloutPlacement, default style red border 3 / radius 6 / shadow; Layer.resized(to:) re-derives magnification for callouts. Creation flight: CanvasNSView crops the on-screen composite to the source box and animates it (CA implicit, 0.35s easeOut) into the placed frame while outline+leaders fade in; pre-commit composite held until flight ends (calloutHoldImage). Reposition: beginLayerDrag skips the sprite preview for callouts (sprite can't carry backdrop-sampled content), so moves fall back to full re-renders — leader lines follow live; revisit per-move cost in phase 7 perf pass. VERIFIED: 300 tests + headless render of a tool-built callout (pixels correct). NOT yet verified by hand: flight animation + drag feel (synthetic events blocked by missing accessibility/TCC permission — needs a manual run).

tasks.title: Inspector: magnification slider, border color/width, shape (rect/circle)
tasks.notes: ZoomCalloutContent.shape (rectangle|circle, decodeIfPresent for old payloads); circle = maximal rounded rect (capsule on non-square) via effectiveCornerRadius(boxSize:styleRadius:), used by both the box (DocumentRenderer) and the source outline (overlay rasterizer). Inspector lives in the existing style popover (S) when a callout is selected: shared swatch row → border color, width dots → border width, plus magnification slider (1.25–6×) and shape toggle. Slider rides the frame preview/commit machinery — previewCalloutMagnification maps mag→frame (center-anchored), resized(to:) derives mag back from the frame, selectedCalloutMagnification reads the preview frame so the slider doesn't snap back; one undo step per slider gesture.

tasks.title: Liveness: callout re-renders when source pixels change beneath it
